title: Build failure on OSX due to missing C++11 flag
body:
Attempting to build the most recent commit of Verilator fails on OSX due to C++11 issues (trace below). Note that configure correctly picked up that my version of clang has C++11 support. Adding the flag manually using `CFLAGS='std=c++11' make` results in a working build.

```
kkiningh:~/Workspace/Research/verilator$ git rev-parse HEAD
ea9b65fe6daa8b7f1546330b473aad308dc95764
kkiningh:~/Workspace/Research/verilator$ make
autoconf

g++   -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -DYYDEBUG 	 -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MP  -Qunused-arguments -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/usr/local/share/verilator\" -c ../Verilator.cpp -o Verilator.o
```
